positive: Stylized minimalist portrait of a majestic, wise owl sitting on a branch, viewed from the front. The owl should have sharp, elegant feathers and luminous yellow eyes. The background is a deep, cosmic indigo gradient transitioning into forest emerald, rendered with visible, stylized celestial nebula dust and faint crescent moons. The style is clean graphic vector art mixed with bioluminescent ink effects, featuring strong, high-contrast silhouettes and linework. Composition must be centered, symmetrical, and highly impactful for a textile print. Full body view, vertical composition. Lit by an ethereal, soft moonlight source coming from the upper left, casting dramatic, deep shadows. Color palette: Midnight blue, deep teal, gold accents, and rich forest green. Rule of thirds applied to the owl's head for visual balance.
negative: blurry, artifact, low resolution, grain, noise, watermark, text, logo, bad anatomy, extra limbs, deformed, signature, poor composition, messy, muted colors
